_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using non-attribution networks to obtain open source data.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-002 (SP, cosine: 0.418), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.417).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.319). Shared vocabulary: [non, skill]. DCWF-only terms [attribution, data, networks, obtain, open, source] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.893, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (97.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in using non-attribution networks to obtain open source data." and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.441 > STS 0.319 (gap +0.122). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [non, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [non, skill]. DCWF-only: [attribution, data, networks, obtain, open, source]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation].
